recommendations.title: Pineapple Express
recommendations.overview: A stoner and his dealer are forced to go on the run from the police after the pothead witnesses a cop commit a murder.

recommendations.title: The Borrowers
recommendations.overview: The four-inch-tall Clock family secretly share a house with the normal-sized Lender family, "borrowing" such items as thread, safety pins, batteries and scraps of food. However, their peaceful co-existence is disturbed when evil lawyer Ocious P. Pott

recommendations.title: No Mercy
recommendations.overview: An unconventional undercover Chicago cop and his partner are recruited to commit the murder of a New Orleans criminal kingpin.

recommendations.title: Sweet Girl
recommendations.overview: A man vows to bring justice to those responsible for his wife's death while protecting the only family he has left, his daughter.

recommendations.title: D.E.B.S.
recommendations.overview: The star of a team of teenage crime fighters falls for the alluring villainess she must bring to justice.

recommendations.title: Die Hard
recommendations.overview: NYPD cop John McClane's plan to reconcile with his estranged wife is thrown for a serious loop when, minutes after he arrives at her office's Christmas Party, the entire building is overtaken by a group of terrorists. With little help from the LAPD,

recommendations.title: Justice, My Foot!
recommendations.overview: An unscrupulous lawyer with an equally eccentric kung-fu sidekick wife tries to bring justice to the court.

recommendations.title: The Bad Guys
recommendations.overview: When the Bad Guys, a crew of criminal animals, are finally caught after years of heists and being the world’s most-wanted villains, Mr. Wolf brokers a deal to save them all from prison.

recommendations.title: Spider-Ham: Caught in a Ham
recommendations.genres: Animation, Action, Comedy, Family, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: Spider-Ham: Caught in a Ham follows Spider-Ham as he faces off against bad guys, chows down on hot dogs, and makes plenty of food-based puns.

recommendations.title: Showtime
recommendations.overview: A spoof of buddy cop movies where two very different cops are forced to team up on a new reality based T.V. cop show.
